node_kinds.name: WZ_Agent
node_kinds.description: A monitored endpoint registered in Wazuh.

node_kinds.name: WZ_AgentGroup
node_kinds.description: A Wazuh agent group used to share configuration and rules.

node_kinds.name: WZ_ClusterNode
node_kinds.description: A Wazuh manager node (master, worker, or standalone).

node_kinds.name: WZ_Cluster
node_kinds.description: A Wazuh manager cluster (or standalone manager).

node_kinds.name: WZ_IndexerCluster
node_kinds.description: A Wazuh Indexer cluster grouping indexer nodes.

node_kinds.name: WZ_Role
node_kinds.description: A Wazuh RBAC role grouping policies.

node_kinds.name: WZ_Policy
node_kinds.description: A Wazuh RBAC policy defining allowed/denied actions on resources.

node_kinds.name: WZ_IndexerUser
node_kinds.description: A Wazuh Indexer (OpenSearch) internal user with direct access to log data.

node_kinds.name: WZ_IndexerRole
node_kinds.description: An OpenSearch security role defining cluster and index permissions.

node_kinds.name: WZ_NetworkSegment
node_kinds.description: An IP subnet containing one or more Wazuh agents.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_MemberOf
relationship_kinds.description: Agent belongs to an agent group.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_ConnectedTo
relationship_kinds.description: Agent reports to a cluster node.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_PartOf
relationship_kinds.description: Node is part of a cluster (manager or indexer).

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_ManagedBy
relationship_kinds.description: Agent group is managed by the Wazuh cluster.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_Monitors
relationship_kinds.description: Wazuh manager cluster sends events to the indexer cluster.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_HasRole
relationship_kinds.description: Wazuh user is assigned a security role.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_HasPolicy
relationship_kinds.description: Wazuh role includes a security policy.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_AccessesIndexer
relationship_kinds.description: Indexer internal user has access to the indexer cluster.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_MappedToRole
relationship_kinds.description: Indexer user is mapped to an OpenSearch security role.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_CanControlAgent
relationship_kinds.description: Policy grants agent control actions (restart, upgrade, delete) on this target.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_CanManageSecurity
relationship_kinds.description: Policy grants user/role/policy management - privilege escalation path.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_CanReadIndex
relationship_kinds.description: Indexer role grants read access to log indices.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_CanWriteIndex
relationship_kinds.description: Indexer role grants write access to log indices.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_InSegment
relationship_kinds.description: Agent belongs to a network segment (subnet).

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_CanImpersonate
relationship_kinds.description: User has allow_run_as - can impersonate other users via the API.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_CanInjectEvents
relationship_kinds.description: Policy allows event:ingest - can inject fake log events into the manager (detection bypass / log poisoning).

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_CanExecuteAR
relationship_kinds.description: Policy allows active-response:command - can execute scripts on agents via the API.

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_CanWriteConfig
relationship_kinds.description: Policy allows manager:upload or configuration:update - can overwrite active-response scripts or ossec.conf on the manager (RCE path).

relationship_kinds.name: WZ_SharedSegment
relationship_kinds.description: Two agents share a network segment - lateral movement path.
